Madeira Course Catalog
  • Art Courses

This site uses Just the Docs, a documentation theme for Jekyll.
Algebra I

3 block(s)

Prereq: None

Geometry

3 block(s)

Prereq: Returning students—Algebra I; New students—by placement test

Algebra II

3-4 block(s)

Prereq: Returning Students – B+ or higher in Geometry leads to 3 Mods of Algebra II. New Students - by placement test.

Extended Algebra II

3 block(s)

Prereq: Returning Students - Geometry A or higher and department approval. New Students - by placement test and the Academic Dean and Math Department Chair's approval.

Precalculus

3 block(s)

Prereq: Returning Students - Algebra II with a B-. New Students - by placement test and the Academic Dean and Math Department Chair's approval.

Extended Precalculus

3 block(s)

Prereq: Returning Students – Extended Algebra II with an A and department approval. Algebra II students with an A or above, and department approval. New Students - by placement test and the Academic Dean and Math Department Chair's approval.

Calculus

3 block(s)

Prereq: Returning Students - Trigonometry, Precalculus with a B- or higher, or Extended Precalculus. New Students - by placement test and the Academic Dean and Math Department Chair's approval.

AP Calculus AB

3 block(s)

Prereq: Extended Precalculus with a B or higher, Precalculus with an A or higher, or Calculus, and department approval.

AP Calculus BC

3-4 block(s)

Prereq: Extended Precalculus with an A or higher, AP Calculus AB with a B or higher, and department approval. Students who complete AP Calculus AB prior to taking this course may elect not to take the first block of BC.

Multivariable Calculus

3 block(s)

Prereq: AP Calculus BC or AP Calculus AB with a B+ or higher.

Linear Algebra

3 block(s)

Prereq: AP Calculus BC or AP Calculus AB with a B+ or higher.

Differential Equations

3 block(s)

Prereq: AP Calculus BC or AP Calculus AB with a B+ or higher

Computer Science I

1 block(s)

Prereq: Algebra I

Computer Science II

1 block(s)

Prereq: Computer Science 1 or Placement test.

Computer Science III

1 block(s)

Prereq: Computer Science 2 or Placement test.

Computer Science Seminar

1 block(s)

Prereq: Computer Science 3.

Engineering for Robotics

1 block(s)

Prereq: None

Programming for Robotics

1 block(s)

Prereq: None

Statistics: Data and Display

1 block(s)

Prereq: Algebra II

Statistics: Probability

1 block(s)

Prereq: Algebra II

Data Science

1 block(s)

Prereq: Statistics: Data & Display or Computer Science I

Advanced Statistics

3 block(s)

Prereq: Extended Algebra II, or Precalculus, or department approval.

Applied Mathematics: Personal Finance

1 block(s)

Prereq: Algebra II

Applied Mathematics: Financial Mathematics

1 block(s)

Prereq: Algebra II

Robotics (Evening)

1 per season block(s)

Prereq: None

Prerequisites

Corequisites

Notes

Description
